description_long: This is a compact, modern kettle with a rounded white body and a pale green, conical spout lid. The kettle features two symmetrical, side-mounted handles that are rectangular in shape, providing a secure grip. The spout is integrated into the lid, which is slightly domed and appears to be removable. The base of the kettle is flat and stable, with a subtle recessed area on the lower front and back, possibly for aesthetic or ergonomic reasons. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments, giving it a minimalist appearance.
description: A small, white kettle with a pale green conical spout lid and two rectangular side handles, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pale green conical spout, both side handles, and a recessed area at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one handle and the smooth, continuous curve of the lid and spout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back handle, the spout from behind, and the recessed base area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other handle and the profile of the spout and lid.
attribute_lid_design: domed removable lid integrated with spout
